chapter_title.en: The Severity of a Believer’s Afflictions

text: 1 - عن زرارة قال: سمعت أبا جعفر عليه السلام يقول: في قضاء الله عز وجل كل خير للمؤمن

en.muhajir-b-ali: 1. It has been narrated that Zurarah said “I heard Abu Jafar (a.s) say “In the decree of Allah ﷻ , there is nothing but good for a believer”
